references.text: [EGRS75] Erd\H{o}s, P. and Graham, R. L. and Ruzsa, I. Z. and Straus, E. G., On the prime factors of $(\sp{2n}\sb{n})$. Math. Comp. (1975), 83-92.

remarks.text: A conjecture of Erd\H{o}s, Graham, Ruzsa, and Straus \cite{EGRS75}. For comparison the classical estimate of Mertens states that\[\sum_{p\leq n}\frac{1}{p}\sim \log\log n.\]By $n\in (p/2,p)\pmod{p}$ we mean $n\equiv r\pmod{p}$ for some integer $r$ with $p/2<r<p$.

statement.text: As $n\to \infty$ ranges over integers\[\sum_{p\leq n}1_{n\in (p/2,p)\pmod{p}}\frac{1}{p}\sim \frac{\log\log n}{2}.\]
